title: GraphAffectedResult
description: Structured result of MetaprojectPort.graphAffected — transitive dependents (blast radius) of a target file/symbol, from createGdgraphService().affected / computeAffected.

target.description: The file or symbol whose dependents were computed.

depth.description: Max hop depth traversed (default when omitted is adapter-defined).

ranked.description: Whether entries are ranked (hop asc, then fanIn desc, then path asc).

id.description: Node id (file path or symbol id).

path.description: File path when the node is a file.

hop.description: Distance in dependency hops from the target.

truncated.description: True when the result was capped by an output bound.
